\paragraph{Embedding-based trace summary.} Prototype-embedding trace summaries are currently available only for the image fingerprint runs in the canonical artifacts. In 30B, DD and OT account for \HDSTestTraceEmbedDDCountImageThirtyB{} and \HDSTestTraceEmbedOTCountImageThirtyB{} of \HDSTestTraceEmbedResolvedTotalImageThirtyB{} resolved traces, while RC and STYLE remain rare at \HDSTestTraceEmbedRCCountImageThirtyB{} and \HDSTestTraceEmbedSTYLECountImageThirtyB{}. DD- and OT-targeted image items retain the strongest embedding-based detection (\HDSTestDDTraceEmbedDetectionImageAltThirtyB{} / \HDSTestOTTraceEmbedDetectionImageAltThirtyB{}), whereas RC remains weak (\HDSTestRCTraceEmbedDetectionImageAltThirtyB{}).
